thirty_day_retention_estimate.reasoning: No email drip, no daily digest, no push notifications, no community, no portfolio tracking, no alerts. Users visit once, see a prediction, and have no reason to return. The product is a 'look-up tool' not a 'daily habit.' Compare: Zerodha Varsity (60%+ 30d retention via progress tracking), Tickertape (~35% via watchlist alerts), Moneycontrol (~25% via news push). SSI currently has zero retention mechanics beyond manual revisits.

homepage_audit.what_it_does: Clear: 'AI-native Indian equity intelligence', 'transforms thousands of signals into actionable stock intelligence'
homepage_audit.why_different: Partially clear: methodology transparency, provider-driven data, no paid rankings — but the 5-second elevator pitch is buried in hero copy
homepage_audit.why_trustworthy: Shown via trust signals banner (provider-driven, no manual picks, confidence scores) but no live numbers or social proof
issues: No live metrics (e.g. '124 companies tracked today', 'Hit rate: 68%') — all claims are unverified on page
No social proof: no testimonials, no user count, no logos of users/institutions
CTA 'Open workspace' is intimidating — first visit should be 'See RELIANCE analysis' with one click
Terminal mockup is static SVG, not interactive — loses the 'aha' moment
Trust banner items are bullet points, not verifiable stats

reliance.prediction: Health Score 50/100 shown with radial gauge — but the score is the same default for all stocks with missing API data
reliance.confidence: Shown as badge (Medium/High/Very High) with confidence engine scores for data completeness, signal agreement, risk consistency, historical stability
reliance.rationale: Narrative text explains composite health, engine breakdowns show individual factor contributions
reliance.expected_return: NOT SHOWN — no forward return projection, no alpha estimate, no price target
reliance.risk: Risk engine with 4 sub-scores (accounting anomalies, leverage stress, cash flow strains, volatility risk) and red flag count

issues: Health Score defaults to 50 when API data is unavailable — misleading, should show 'Calculating...' or last known score with age indicator
No expected return or price target — a prediction product without predicted returns is fundamentally incomplete
No comparison to sector peers on same page — user must manually search each peer
No historical prediction accuracy shown on the stock page itself

trust_centre_audit.hit_rates: Shown as fallback values: Alpha 0.12, Hit Rate 68%, Sharpe 1.85 — but these are static defaults, not live computed values
trust_centre_audit.validation_history: Reports section links to 6 JSON/MD validation reports — but links likely broken in production (relative paths)
trust_centre_audit.methodology: Well documented: factor decomposition, quality engine v4, risk engine, explainability, sector-neutral ranking
trust_centre_audit.prediction_archive: NOT PRESENT — no searchable prediction history, no date-filtered archive, no CSV export
issues: Key metrics are static fallback values, not live — undermines the entire 'verify us' premise
No filterable prediction archive by company/date/horizon
No performance vs benchmark over time chart
Validation report links are relative paths that fail on the SPA
Limitations section says '30 covered companies' — but we have 130 now — outdated copy

advantages: Raw financial data at your fingertips — balance sheet, P&L, cash flow
Trusted by serious fundamental investors for years
disadvantages: No predictive analytics — pure data, no intelligence layer
No risk scoring, no health score, no factor decomposition
No confidence metrics or data freshness transparency

advantages: Modern UI with visual scoring (Scorecard, MMI)
disadvantages: No factor decomposition or engine transparency
No confidence calibration shown to users

advantages: Insider trading and bulk deal tracking
disadvantages: Complex, overwhelming UI for retail investors
No unified health score — scattered metrics
Paywalled premium features limit free tier

ssi_unique_advantages: Transparent factor decomposition with engine-level breakdowns
Confidence calibration shown on every prediction
Anti-cheating auditor and prediction registry (immutable record)
ssi_disadvantages: No portfolio tracking or P&L (Screener/Tickertape have this)
No watchlist alerts or price notifications
No mobile app (all competitors have apps)
No expected return / price target on predictions
Smaller coverage universe (130 vs 5000+ for Screener)
Static fallback data when APIs fail — undermines trust

strong_reasons: Factor decomposition is genuinely unique — no competitor shows engine-level transparency
Confidence calibration appeals to analytical investors who distrust black boxes
Data freshness monitoring gives reason to check if data is 'fresh' today
weak_reasons: No email digest or daily brief — zero outbound re-engagement
No watchlist alerts — if RELIANCE health changes, user never knows
No portfolio tracking — users can't see their holdings vs predictions
No 'what changed today' summary — user must manually scan all stocks
missing_reasons: Daily Brief email: 'Your watchlist health changed today'
Push notifications: 'TCS health score dropped from 78 to 62'
Weekly prediction accuracy report: 'Last week's predictions: 71% hit rate'
Portfolio import and tracking against predictions
Streak/progress system: 'You've checked RELIANCE 5 days in a row'
Mobile app with widgets for watchlist scores
Market open/close briefings on key movers

virality_analysis.would_share_to_friends: UNLIKELY — no 'share this stock analysis' button, no referral incentive, no social preview cards
virality_analysis.would_share_to_whatsapp: UNLIKELY — no WhatsApp-optimized share cards, no one-tap sharing, prediction images not optimized for messaging
virality_analysis.would_share_to_communities: POSSIBLE for ValuePickr/TradingQnA — if prediction accuracy stats were compelling, but currently no easily shareable proof
why_not: No social sharing buttons anywhere on stock pages
No 'Share this prediction' with auto-generated image card
No referral program (invite friends, unlock premium)
No prediction leaderboard or 'top calls' public page
what_would_make_it_viral: Shareable prediction cards: 'SSI predicts TCS will outperform Nifty by 3.2%' with a beautiful card
Public prediction leaderboard: top 10 most accurate predictions this month
Challenge mode: 'Can you beat the SSI engine? Predict next week's RELIANCE score'
WhatsApp bot: send a stock name, get the health score back
Prediction accuracy brag: 'Our 90-day predictions were 74% accurate last quarter — share this'

free_features: Factor breakdown (growth, quality, stability, momentum, valuation)
premium_worthy_features: Prediction accuracy history per company (₹99 tier)
Expected returns and price targets (₹299 tier)
Watchlist with health change alerts (₹99 tier)
Portfolio tracking with prediction overlay (₹299 tier)
Daily brief email with watchlist updates (₹99 tier)
API access for algo trading (₹999 tier)
Priority data freshness (real-time vs EOD) (₹999 tier)
Sector rotation signals and institutional flow data (₹999 tier)

rs_99.name: Individual Investor

rs_299.name: Serious Investor
rs_299.features: Everything in ₹99 + portfolio tracking, expected returns, peer comparison, custom watchlists, CSV export
rs_299.target: Active investors managing their own portfolio

rs_999.name: Professional / Algo Trader
rs_999.features: Everything in ₹299 + API access, real-time data, backtesting, custom factor weights, priority support

top_15_product_issues.issue: Static fallback data shown when APIs fail
top_15_product_issues.impact: Health scores default to 50/100 — users see the same score for every stock and lose all trust
top_15_product_issues.fix: Show last known score with a 'Data age: X days' badge. Only show fallback when no prior data exists.

top_15_product_issues.issue: No expected return or price target on predictions
top_15_product_issues.impact: A prediction product without predicted returns is incomplete — users have no actionable insight
top_15_product_issues.fix: Add forward return projection based on factor trajectory and momentum decay models (already described in methodology)

top_15_product_issues.issue: No email drip, daily digest, or push notifications
top_15_product_issues.impact: Zero outbound re-engagement — users visit once and never return
top_15_product_issues.fix: Implement daily brief email with watchlist health changes; add push notifications for score shifts

top_15_product_issues.issue: No social sharing or referral mechanics
top_15_product_issues.impact: Zero organic growth — every user must be acquired via paid channels
top_15_product_issues.fix: Add 'Share this prediction' button with auto-generated card; implement referral program

top_15_product_issues.issue: Trust centre shows static fallback metrics, not live data
top_15_product_issues.impact: Undermines the entire 'verify us' premise — savvy investors will spot this immediately
top_15_product_issues.fix: Wire trust centre to live prediction_registry queries showing real-time hit rate, alpha, and calibration

top_15_product_issues.impact: Indian retail investors are mobile-first — 85%+ of Screener/Tickertape traffic is mobile
top_15_product_issues.fix: Build React Native app or optimize PWA with home screen install prompt and push notifications

top_15_product_issues.issue: No portfolio tracking or P&L overlay
top_15_product_issues.impact: Users can't see how predictions relate to their actual holdings — reduces utility to pure research
top_15_product_issues.fix: Add portfolio import (CSV/broker API) and overlay predictions on holdings

top_15_product_issues.issue: Homepage CTA is 'Open workspace' instead of one-click demo
top_15_product_issues.impact: First-time visitors hit a signup wall before seeing any value
top_15_product_issues.fix: Change primary CTA to 'See RELIANCE analysis →' with guest access; signup as secondary action

top_15_product_issues.issue: No prediction accuracy history visible on stock pages
top_15_product_issues.impact: Users can't gauge if past predictions were accurate for this specific stock
top_15_product_issues.fix: Add 'Historical Accuracy' section showing last 10 predictions vs actual outcomes

top_15_product_issues.issue: Terminal mockup on homepage is static SVG, not interactive
top_15_product_issues.impact: Loses the 'wow' moment — feels like a marketing page, not a real product
top_15_product_issues.fix: Make it a live ticker showing real-time health scores cycling through top 10 stocks

top_15_product_issues.impact: Even returning users must manually scan all stocks — no curated entry point
top_15_product_issues.fix: Add 'Today's Movers' section on dashboard: health score changes >5 points, new predictions, confidence shifts

top_15_product_issues.impact: No network effect — users can't discuss predictions or share insights within the platform
top_15_product_issues.fix: Add comment/discussion threads per stock prediction (moderated, SEBI-compliant research discussion only)

top_15_product_issues.issue: Trust centre limitations says '30 covered companies' — actually 130
top_15_product_issues.impact: Makes the product look smaller and less credible than it actually is
top_15_product_issues.fix: Update copy to reflect actual coverage; make this a live-updating number

top_15_product_issues.issue: No prediction archive or CSV export
top_15_product_issues.impact: Power users can't export data for their own analysis — limits utility
top_15_product_issues.fix: Add prediction history page with date range filter, CSV/JSON export

top_15_product_issues.impact: Users must switch between SSI and their trading platform — adds friction
top_15_product_issues.fix: Integrate with Zerodha/Upstox APIs for one-click order placement from prediction page

final_question.question: If launched today to 1,000 investors, how many would still be active after 30 days?
reasoning: First-visit retention (~30%): 300 users will return for a second visit out of curiosity about another stock
Week-1 retention (~50% of returnees): 150 users will actively use it for a week — checking multiple stocks, exploring factor breakdowns
Week-4 retention (~80% of week-1): 120 users form a habit of checking before market open or during research
WHY SO LOW: No push/email re-engagement, no portfolio tracking, no alerts, no community, no mobile app, no daily digest. The product is a 'lookup tool' not a 'daily destination.'
COMPARISON: Good SaaS products retain 40-60% at 30 days. Fintech products with habit loops (Zerodha, Groww) retain 70%+. SSI's current feature set is closer to a content site (~10-20% retention).
QUICKEST FIX: Add watchlist email digest + health change alerts. This alone could boost 30-day retention to 30-35%.
